prompt: Shallow stack adjustment proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when stack depth and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raise fits because the stack is still strong enough to put real pressure on weaker hands.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is the better line when the shallow-stack pressure setup gives you enough leverage to make weaker continues uncomfortable. This is the spot to attack because price and depth now support aggression instead of another passive decision.
